text:
Yes, agree with patch, please update!

2012/3/13 Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org>:
> Maintainer of databases/p5-HTML-FormHandler-Model-DBIC,
>
> Please note that PR ports/165999 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> =C2=A0 =C2=A0http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/165999

> --
